text:
In the forest lived a bear. This bear made a den, had a family, wandered wide awake... until one night, it slumbered, its dream of flying like an eagle. That morning, it was determined to learn. Soon it soared. And soared.

It became an eagle, but alas, soon realized it had forgotten how to walk on four legs. That's when it thought... Why not fly everywhere?

Days turning into weeks, it flew haphazardly overland. Found it odd how all the humans talked about things soaring.

One day a girl saw it. "Wow, you're really up high!" she said.

"I've always wanted to see the world. Just like you," piped up an oddly feathered bird.

Over the seasons it visited every place a bird would perch. Never forgot how to walk. Always came back down.

Until the eagle learned to glide. And glide it did.

Now everybody calls her Glenda. They say she has everywhere in
